'''ây-zh-f''' ('''kayazhaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:publicate|publicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:publicate|publicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kayazhaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazhaf|thiyazhaf]] || [[word:jiyazhaf|jiyazhaf]] || [[word:shiyazhaf|shiyazhaf]] || [[word:kiyazhaf|kiyazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyazhaf|thuthuyazhaf]] || [[word:jujuyazhaf|jujuyazhaf]] || [[word:shushuyazhaf|shushuyazhaf]] || [[word:kukuyazhaf|kukuyazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyazhaf|thuyazhaf]] || [[word:juyazhaf|juyazhaf]] || [[word:shuyazhaf|shuyazhaf]] || [[word:kuyazhaf|kuyazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyazhaf|thuyazhaf]] || [[word:juyazhaf|juyazhaf]] || [[word:shuyazhaf|shuyazhaf]] || [[word:kuyazhaf|kuyazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyazhaf|theyazhaf]] || [[word:jeyazhaf|jeyazhaf]] || [[word:sheyazhaf|sheyazhaf]] || [[word:keyazhaf|keyazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyazhaf|thothoyazhaf]] || [[word:jojoyazhaf|jojoyazhaf]] || [[word:shoshoyazhaf|shoshoyazhaf]] || [[word:kokoyazhaf|kokoyazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyazhaf|thoyazhaf]] || [[word:joyazhaf|joyazhaf]] || [[word:shoyazhaf|shoyazhaf]] || [[word:koyazhaf|koyazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyazhaf|thoyazhaf]] || [[word:joyazhaf|joyazhaf]] || [[word:shoyazhaf|shoyazhaf]] || [[word:koyazhaf|koyazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyazhaf|thĂŠyazhaf]] || [[word:jĂŠyazhaf|jĂŠyazhaf]] || [[word:shĂŠyazhaf|shĂŠyazhaf]] || [[word:kĂŠyazhaf|kĂŠyazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayazhaf|thathayazhaf]] || [[word:jajayazhaf|jajayazhaf]] || [[word:shashayazhaf|shashayazhaf]] || [[word:kakayazhaf|kakayazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayazhaf|thayazhaf]] || [[word:jayazhaf|jayazhaf]] || [[word:shayazhaf|shayazhaf]] || [[word:kayazhaf|kayazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayazhaf|thayazhaf]] || [[word:jayazhaf|jayazhaf]] || [[word:shayazhaf|shayazhaf]] || [[word:kayazhaf|kayazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayazhaf|shayazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayazhaf|goshayazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayazhaf|gokishayazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayazhafnĂŒ|shayazhafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayazhafnknĂŒ|goshayazhafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayazhafnĂŒ|gokishayazhafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayazhafshĂ«|shayazhafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkshĂ«|goshayazhafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayazhafshĂ«|gokishayazhafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayazhafro|shayazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkro|goshayazhafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayazhafro|gokishayazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayazhafmu|shayazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkmu|goshayazhafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayazhafmu|gokishayazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayazhafsher|shayazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayazhafnksher|goshayazhafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayazhafsher|gokishayazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayazhafng|shayazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkng|goshayazhafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayazhafng|gokishayazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayazhafya|shayazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkya|goshayazhafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayazhafya|gokishayazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayazhafyam|shayazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkyam|goshayazhafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayazhafyam|gokishayazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayazhafnĂŒshĂ«|shayazhafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayazhafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayazhafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayazhafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayazhafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayazhafnĂŒro|shayazhafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayazhafnknĂŒro|goshayazhafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayazhafnĂŒro|gokishayazhafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayazhafnĂŒmu|shayazhafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayazhafnknĂŒmu|goshayazhafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayazhafnĂŒmu|gokishayazhafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayazhafshĂ«nĂŒ|shayazhafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayazhafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayazhafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayazhafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayazhafshĂ«ro|shayazhafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkshĂ«ro|goshayazhafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayazhafshĂ«ro|gokishayazhafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayazhafshĂ«mu|shayazhafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkshĂ«mu|goshayazhafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayazhafshĂ«mu|gokishayazhafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayazhafronĂŒ|shayazhafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkronĂŒ|goshayazhafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayazhafronĂŒ|gokishayazhafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayazhafroshĂ«|shayazhafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkroshĂ«|goshayazhafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayazhafroshĂ«|gokishayazhafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayazhafromu|shayazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkromu|goshayazhafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayazhafromu|gokishayazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayazhafmunĂŒ|shayazhafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkmunĂŒ|goshayazhafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayazhafmunĂŒ|gokishayazhafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayazhafmushĂ«|shayazhafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkmushĂ«|goshayazhafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayazhafmushĂ«|gokishayazhafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayazhafmuro|shayazhafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayazhafnkmuro|goshayazhafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayazhafmuro|gokishayazhafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
